title: aria whiteana
intro: Aria whiteana, also known as Aerva lanata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aria whiteana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Aria whiteana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
